instructions.text: Listen to conversation, note main points
instructions.audio: Catch the key information being discussed

conversations.audio: Teacher: Your science project is due next Friday. Student: What should we include? Teacher: You need a poster board, a written report, and be ready to present for 5 minutes. Student: Can we work in groups? Teacher: Yes, groups of 2 or 3 are fine.
acceptableNotes: Sci project Fri: poster + report + present 5min, groups 2-3
Next Fri: poster board, written report, 5 min talk, partners ok

conversations.audio: Parent: The field trip permission slip is due Monday. Student: Where are we going? Parent: The science museum downtown. It's an all-day trip from 9am to 3pm. Bring a lunch. Student: Do I need money? Parent: Bring $5 for the gift shop.

Teacher: For homework read chapter 7 and answer questions 1 through 10 on page 95. Also study your vocabulary words because we're having a quiz Thursday. Student: Is the reading due tomorrow? Teacher: No, it's due Wednesday but the quiz is Thursday so start studying tonight.

tryAgain.message: Focus on: what, when, where, how much
